subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends! Today must all the inhabitants of Iran, with the utmost determination and zeal, work for the good of the government [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی امروز جمیع اهالی ایران باید در کمال همت و غیرت در خیر دولت
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @two kinds of civilization; material and spiritual civilization
